nodes.title: Malam Tujuh Likur Memory
nodes.description: A memory of lights, preparation, and neighbourly gathering before Hari Raya.

nodes.title: Sea Route Between Islands
nodes.description: A memory of movement between islands by boat, shaped by tides, currents, and weather.

links.reason: Both memories are connected to island life and community movement around Pulau Brani and surrounding islands.

review_notes: The relationship between ritual memory and maritime movement is interpretive and should be reviewed by community contributors.
